rationale: The PowerShell command line (A0, DER-001) uses obfuscation, which is suspicious. More critically, the lsass.exe process (EV-003, EV-004) accessed the PowerShell process (A0) with `0x1000` (PROCESS_VM_READ) and `0x1478` (PROCESS_VM_READ | PROCESS_VM_WRITE | PROCESS_VM_OPERATION) access rights. This indicates an attempt to read and potentially modify the memory of the PowerShell process, which is highly indicative of credential dumping or process injection.
